Table	Create Table
users	CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `openId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `loginMethod` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','admin') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `users_openId_unique` (`openId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=330001
Table	Create Table
companies	CREATE TABLE `companies` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `facebookAccessToken` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `catalogs` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `accessKey` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `tokenExpiresAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
Table	Create Table
company_members	CREATE TABLE `company_members` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `memberRole` enum('owner','member') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  `status` enum('active','pending') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `userId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
Table	Create Table
upload_records	CREATE TABLE `upload_records` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `catalogId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `retailerId` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `productName` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `productImageUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `video4x5Download` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `video4x5Embed` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `video9x16Download` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `video9x16Embed` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `clientName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `uploadTimestamp` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `uploadedBy` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `companyId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=120001
Table	Create Table
app_settings	CREATE TABLE `app_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `settingKey` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `settingValue` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `app_settings_settingKey_unique` (`settingKey`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
Table	Create Table
slideshow_templates	CREATE TABLE `slideshow_templates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `aspectRatio` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '4:5',
  `durationPerImage` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '3',
  `transition` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fade',
  `transitionDuration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '50',
  `showProductName` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `textPosition` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bottom',
  `fontSize` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '40',
  `fontFamily` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'noto-sans-cjk',
  `fontColor` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '#FFFFFF',
  `backgroundColor` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '#FFFFFF',
  `imageScale` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '100',
  `imageOffsetX` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `imageOffsetY` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `overlayText` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
